name: Attempt to Access Child of a Non-structure Pointer
description: The product casts a non-structure type to a structure type and accesses a field, which can lead to memory access errors or data corruption. This occurs when incompatible type conversions allow code to treat non-struct pointers as struct pointers.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM node that performs a type cast from a non-structure pointer to a structure pointer, followed by a field access operation. Look for TRANSFORM[cast] nodes where the source type is not a struct but the target type is, followed by member dereference.
